block_01: The debate between advocates of technical and fundamental analysis seems to be eternal. Both sides are armed with facts and arguments to prove their point.
block_02: The two types of analysis are inherently different, yet aim to solve the same problem — predicting future price movements.
block_03: Today we will explore the question: is there a single best type of analysis? Do you really have to choose between one or the other? Read as we settle this argument once and for all.
